mdSummary:
# BorderBeam

Animated gradient border beam effect for hero elements.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/border-beam

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BorderBeam | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BorderBeam | Size | `BeamSize` | `BeamSize.Md` |  |
| BorderBeam | DurationMs | `int` | `8000` |  |
| BorderBeam | ColorFrom | `string?` | `` | Starting color of the beam. Accepts any CSS color — defaults to var(--color-primary). |
| BorderBeam | ColorTo | `string?` | `` | Ending color of the beam. Accepts any CSS color — defaults to var(--color-primary). |
| BorderBeam | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BorderBeam | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (BorderBeam) — RenderFragment slot
